---
title: "01 — Basics"
format: html
---

# Python basics

```{python}
x = 10
if x > 5:
    print('x is greater than 5')
```

<details>
  <summary>Exercise — write a function that returns factorial</summary>

```{python}
def factorial(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return 1
    return n * factorial(n-1)

print(factorial(5))
```

</details>
